About Sou Sik

We started from product development, not marketing.

Sou Sik is a coffee grinder brand built around precision mechanics and specialty coffee. We spent our time on product structure, grinding feel, and long-term user experience before building this website.

We believe a brand isn't packaged into existence—it begins the moment a user turns the handle, feels the resistance change, and hears the gears click into place.

Mechanical

Let the mechanical structure become the experience itself, not a hidden part.

Coffee

Serving real brewing, not just spec sheets. More stable from light roasts to daily cups.

Ritual

Grinding isn't preparation—it's the first ritual of the coffee experience.

What do we want to change?

Many hand grinders treat "hard, exhausting, jerky" as normal, especially with light-roast beans. Sou Sik wants to bring mechanical engineering into coffee tools—so that effort reduction, stability, and playability coexist.

P-1, Our First Product

P-1 is Sou Sik's first concrete answer. It uses a planetary gear torque system, large-format conical burrs, and low-retention design—so hand grinding isn't just a utility, but a mechanical artifact worth appreciating, disassembling, and understanding.

Official Store

讓每一次研磨，都成為值得期待的機械儀式。

SOU SIK

Mechanical Coffee Instruments. 以精密機械語言，重新定義手搖磨豆機的力學、手感與日常儀式。
